titles.en: Chapter on the Sacrificial Animal Reaching Its Designated Place
Chapter on the Sacrificial Animal Reaching Its Designated Place

segments: : «إِذَا اِشْتَرَى اَلرَّجُلُ هَدْيَهُ وَ قَمَطَهُ فِي بَيْتِهِ فَقَدْ بَلَغَ مَحِلَّهُ فَإِنْ شَاءَ فَلْيَحْلِقْ ».
arabic.text: : «إِذَا اِشْتَرَى اَلرَّجُلُ هَدْيَهُ وَ قَمَطَهُ فِي بَيْتِهِ فَقَدْ بَلَغَ مَحِلَّهُ فَإِنْ شَاءَ فَلْيَحْلِقْ ».

segments:
Hadith.3089 - Ali ibn Abi Hamzah narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"If a man purchases his hady (sacrificial animal) and confines it in his house, it has reached its designated place. If he wishes, he may shave his head."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3089 - Ali ibn Abi Hamzah narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"If a man purchases his hady (sacrificial animal) and confines it in his house, it has reached its designated place. If he wishes, he may shave his head."

narratorChain.raw: 3089 - روى رَوَى عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

parts.text: روى رَوَى عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ
